description:
To-Do List & Calendar

Dida is a powerful to-do & task management app with seamless cloud synchronization across all your devices.
Whether you need to schedule an agenda, make memos, share shopping lists, collaborate in a team, or even develop a new habit, Dida is always here to help you get stuff done and keep life on track.
Major Update: Countdown

Easily keep track of birthdays, anniversaries, exams, or deadlines with the new Countdown feature.

- Days Display: Instantly see how many days are left or have passed.
- Timely Reminders: Get notified on special days so you never miss a moment.
- Rich Styles: Customize your memory page with different layouts and images.
- Synced View: View your countdowns in Smart Lists and Calendar for better planning.

How to Access: Go to Settings > Tab Bar and turn on Countdown.
source: 杭州随笔记网络技术有限公司
